message: SARAH emitted 17 corruption marker(s) across 3 file(s); Mathematica internals leaked into generated output.

log_hints.excerpt: Part::partd: Part specification None[[1]] is longer than depth of object.

user_instruction: SARAH failed to evaluate group-theory / representation quantities upstream; Mathematica sentinels leaked into the generated files. See context.hits[] for file:line evidence and context.log_hints[] for the upstream stderr cascade. Common causes: a matter_sector entry with an ambiguous representation, or a gauge group whose Dynkin/Casimir wasn't pre-computed. Inspect the excerpts, fix the ModelSpec, then re-run /sarah-build.
